_comment: Manual seed list. Curated via Google search for Indian grooming/lifestyle Snapchat profiles. Handles verified via snapchat.com/add/ profile pages.

seed_creators.note: Karanvir Singh Kahlon. Beard grooming tips, urban lifestyle, men's style. India.
NUMBARDAR. 9.7K subscribers. Grooming, style ideas, casual outfit, celebrity style, influencer look. Faridabad, Haryana, India.
BTW_LAKKU_787. Beard grooming tips, hairstyle ideas. India.
Kumar Kartarpur. Fashion, stylish outfit, men's grooming routine, car interior design, sunglasses, men's fashion tips. Chandigarh, Punjab, India.
prince jaat. Beard grooming, men's accessories, camouflage jacket style, men's fashion trends, men's clothing styles, men's lifestyle. India.
Furqan Rather. Men's fashion, hair, beard, skincare. India.
Suleman Khan. Men's grooming, makeup tutorial, beauty, cosmetics, grooming beauty routine, makeup looks, makeup application, beauty hacks. Rudrapur, Uttarakhand, India.
Daman Preet. Hair care, men's hair, barber shop content. India.
Powar Singh. Hairstyle, barbering, Punjabi culture. India.
Raaz. Mens grooming, beard grooming, hair styling, men's accessories. India.
Sadan Arshad. Hair styling technique, barber shop content. India.
YA51R TuNiO. Hair styling, beard, men's style guide, shalwar kameez fashion. Kannada background. India.
Shivam Patel (@shivam_patel47). Men's grooming routine, lifestyle. Indore, India.
Hrithiik Puri. Bold fashion, dark attire, stylish sunglasses, men's style. India.
Fashion Mumbai. 51K subscribers. MEN'S FASHION, WOMENS FASHION, Fashion Inspiration. Mumbai, India.
Deva Dhakad. Traditional Indian style, kurta, historical architecture. Indian lifestyle/style content.
Suraj Bajwa. Punjabi style, driving vlogs. Punjab, India.
Dil Ka Bashah. Young Indian man, rural style, casual fashion. India.
AMAR PATIL. 6.2K followers. Traditional kurta, stylish sandals, men's fashion. Maharashtra, India.
Majhail. Turban, selfie style, Punjabi fashion. Punjab, India.
Deep Shergill. Punjabi, men's style/fashion. India.
Official Saini6. Product reviews (NIVEA face wash), Cash on Delivery. India.
Vijay Saroha. Men's grooming tips, outfit check, men's accessories, fashion for men, style advice. Haryana, India.
